name: frame-craft
description: Generates the still frames a video is born from — keyframe posters, style-bake-off frames, cut-in details — on image models via ai-gen, cheaply and re-rollably, BEFORE any motion spend. Use when: "generate the keyframes/boards/posters", "make the style frames", "this frame needs a re-roll", "bake off the styles", any image generation inside a video project. Chain: consumes style.md's aesthetic block verbatim (style-system runs first); approved frames feed video-prompting (motion) — never generate motion from an unapproved frame. NOT for: motion/clip prompts (use video-prompting), voiceover (use voice-timing), logo compositing or final QC (use assembly-qc).
